title: Wire Brush Set – 11PCS Heavy Duty Wire Brushes with Brass, Stainless Steel & Nylon Bristles, Scraper Tools – Rust, Paint, Dirt Removal – for BBQ, Car Detailing, Home Maintenance & Metal Cleaning
features: All-in-One Brush Kit -- Includes 11 tools: large wire brushes, detail brushes with top heads, mini brushes, and 2 scrapers – everything for rust, paint, and dirt removal.
3 Brush Types for Any Job -- Brass for softer metals, stainless steel for tough rust, nylon for gentle surfaces. Use the right tool for the right surface.
Anti-Slip Handle & Angled Design -- Comfortable grip and curved heads provide better control and reach during heavy scrubbing tasks.
Versatile Cleaning Use -- Great for BBQ grills, car detailing, tools, workshop gear, and home maintenance – works on metal, wood, and plastic.
Bonus Scraper Tools -- Two compact scrapers help remove stuck-on grime in corners and narrow gaps.
description: Wire Brush Set, Metal Rust Remover Brushes Handy Steel/Nylon/Brass Brush Set Suitable for Cleaning Welding Slag and Rust 11pcs
